title: humata patens
intro: Humata patens, also known as the water spangle or giant duckweed, is a floating aquatic plant native to tropical regions in Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Humata patens include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and help manage diabetes. Herbal preparations of Humata patens often include infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and other bodily functions.
